---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose new functionality for InTouch
title: '[Feature] '
labels: feature
assignees: ''
---

## Problem It Solves
A clear description of the problem or gap this feature addresses.

## Proposed Solution
Describe the feature and how it would work from the user's perspective.

## Feature Area
Which part of the app does this touch? (check all that apply)
- [ ] Intent (create/view/join flow)
- [ ] Feed (Personal or Discovery)
- [ ] Groups
- [ ] Notifications
- [ ] Geo / Location
- [ ] Auth / Onboarding
- [ ] Profile
- [ ] Other: ___

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative approaches or workarounds you've considered.

## Additional Context
Mockups, references, or any other context.
